title: September 24
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 24''' is the 267th day of the year (268th in leap years). There are 98 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1950|1950]] – [[Harriet Walter]] is born.
*[[1960s#1961|1961]] – [[Michael Tavera]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Nia Vardalos]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Marc Guggenheim]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Kate Fleetwood]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] marches alongside [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] in the San Anselmo Community Fair and Parade.
*[[1979]] – Filming for [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']] finishes.
*[[1980]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 135|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 135]] published.
*[[1987]] – ''[[Ewoks: The Ewok Fun Colouring Book]]'' published.
*1987 – [[The Haunted Village (book)|''The Haunted Village'']] published.
*1987 – ''[[Sun Star Against Shadow Stone]]'' published.
*1987 – [[To Save Deej (book)|''To Save Deej'']] published.
*1987 – [[Wicket's Wagon (book)|''Wicket's Wagon'']] published.
*[[1997]] – [[Dark Force Rising 5|''Dark Force Rising'' 5]] published.
*[[1998]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – Redemption 3|''Tales of the Jedi – Redemption'' 3]] published.
*[[2003]] – [[Republic 57|''Republic'' 57]] published.
*[[2008]] – [[Legacy (2006) 28|''Legacy'' (2006) 28]] published.
*2008 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Shipyards of Doom]]'' published.
*2008 – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Early Victories]]'' released.
*[[2009]] – ''[[The Shadow Syndicate]]'', the fourth expansion of the [[Star Wars Galaxies Trading Card Game]], is released.
*[[2010]] – "[[Supply Lines]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*2010 – ''[[The Old Republic, Blood of the Empire Act 3: Burn the Future]]'' finished publishing [http://www.swtor.com online].
*[[2013]] – ''[[Razor's Edge]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – ''[[Star Wars Annual 2016]]'' published.
*2016 – ''[[Star Wars Rebels: Steps Into Shadow]]'', the [[Star Wars Rebels Season Three|third season]] premiere of ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]'', airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2019]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back Cinestory Comic]]'' Collector's Edition published.
*[[2021]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars Battles]]'' released.
*[[2024]] – ''[[The High Republic: Tears of the Nameless]]'' published.
*[[2025]] – [[Doctor Aphra – Chaos Agent 4|''Doctor Aphra – Chaos Agent'' 4]] published.
<noinclude>
